channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Pick SaaS niches AI can't erode
item.description: Cut SaaS churn 50% by picking niches AI can't erode — regulatory complexity, data scarcity, and trust asymmetry give you defensibility in 2026

item.title: LLM apps: OWASP’s 10 new attack paths
item.description: Reduce prompt injection losses 95% with OWASP Top 10 guardrails for LLM apps — concrete latency, cost, and incident data from 2026 deployments.

item.title: Debug Nairobi SaaS infra costs 2026
item.description: Nairobi SaaS 2026 cost: $1,104/month at 2.1k DAU — real breakdown with Terraform, FastAPI, Redis, and Cloudflare. Includes latency SLA and NAT savings.

item.title: Frontend tests 2026: Playwright won, Cypress lost
item.description: Cut frontend test time 77% and flake rate 86% with Vitest 1.6 + Playwright 1.44 — real CI costs, setup commands, and the Cypress migration trap most teams miss.

item.title: Claude Code in 2026: one year of lessons learned
item.description: Claude Code 2026 saves 39% PR review time but silently fails audits unless you capture agent events — here’s the 120-line shim we built and the real numbers after 90 days of use.

item.title: Trim $18k AWS bills: 2026 levers mid-size teams miss
item.description: Cut AWS costs 48% with Savings Plans and right-sizing in 2026 — the levers mid-size teams actually need, with benchmarks, Terraform snippets, and the checkpointing mistake most teams still make.

item.title: Daraja 2.0: 60-minute migration checklist
item.description: Cut Daraja 2026 migration time 70% — new OAuth2 flow, HTTPS-only callbacks, and the TLS 1.3 surprise most teams miss.

item.title: AI ate my niche — niches that survived 2026
item.description: Micro-SaaS niches that survived AI commoditisation in 2026 — domain knowledge, hardware optimisation, and AI output auditing. Learn which $29–$500/month tools are still working.

item.title: Freelance rates after AI took the boilerplate
item.description: 2026 freelance rates dropped 28–40% for AI-assisted tasks. Learn how to price the remaining 20% of work clients still need — compliance, edge cases, and audit trails. Real numbers and code included.

item.title: Migrations kill prod: do this instead
item.description: Zero-downtime migrations: why most playbooks fail and one proven split-step method that cut our outage time from 12 minutes to under 30 seconds — with PostgreSQL 15, Aurora metrics, and rollback scripts tested in staging.

item.title: AI ops vs human ops: the incidents that broke them
item.description: Cut incident MTTR 82% with AI ops — PagerDuty AI Copilot vs Rootly autonomous agents compared on 100 real incidents in 2026. Cost, latency, and false-positive data included.

item.title: Trimmed $3k/month Kubernetes to $200 with Fly.io
item.description: Cut monthly infrastructure bill 95% by moving from EKS to Fly.io — $3,966 down to $187, latency dropped 64%, and we saved 12 engineering hours/month

item.title: Passkeys: apps cut auth costs 70%
item.description: Cut auth costs 70% by switching from SMS OTP to passkeys — latency dropped from 6 s to 180 ms, $18 k to $120 monthly bills, and unlocked 2.1 M DAU in 2026.

item.title: 7 patterns for systems that stay up when everything
item.description: Cut duplicate payments and cascade failures 90% with 7 production-grade eventual consistency patterns — benchmarks, code, and the mistake that cost $48k

item.title: Islands beat monoliths in 2026
item.description: Cut Lighthouse TTI 69% and SEO rankings recovered 12% by moving to Astro 5.2 Islands partial hydration — JavaScript dropped 95%, bundle size 240 KB, and costs fell 40%.

item.title: Hit $5k MRR without paid ads
item.description: Hit $5k MRR without paid ads — the exact channels, pricing tweaks, and leak fixes that worked in 2026. Organic growth tactics that compound, with concrete numbers and code examples.

item.title: AI codebase: onboarding 2 devs in 2 hours or quit
item.description: Cut onboarding time 60% with AI codebase rules — versioned prompts, OWNERS files, and the SOC 2 trick most teams skip. Benchmarks, costs, and the 2026 playbook.

item.title: Service mesh in 2026: why most teams drop it
item.description: Cut API latency 60% by choosing the right service mesh. Istio vs Cilium vs Linkerd in 2026 production systems with real benchmarks and cost data.

item.title: Unlock Python 3.13's free-threaded GIL for web apps
item.description: Cut API latency 42% and raise throughput 62% by switching Python 3.13 to free-threaded mode — real numbers and the edge cases most guides miss.

item.title: Log audit costs without breaking compliance
item.description: Cut audit log costs 40%: PostgreSQL vs ClickHouse at 2026 scale — 9 800 events/sec, 28 ms queries, and the write amplification trap most teams miss.
